recipe.title: FENNEL SALAD

steps.instruction: Tip into a bowl, add the cider vinegar and season to taste Toss to mix and leave for about an hour.

ingredient_lines.raw_text: 2 young fennel bulbs, trimmed and green tops

steps.instruction: stirring every so often Chop the green fennel tops and add to the fennel with the rapeseed oil Toss to combine, then taste and adjust the seasoning if necessary. Serve w1thtn a couple of hours.
